---
applyTo: '**/*.cs, **/*.csproj, **/*.fs, **/*.fsproj, **/*.go, **/*.py, **/*.rb, **/*.java, **/*.kt, **/*.ts, **/*.js, **/*.yml, **/*.yaml, **/*.json, **/Dockerfile'
---

consult `.propel/rules/code-documentation-standards.md` for the rule details.

---

*Code documentation rules for comments, API docs, and inline annotations.*
